description: This easy-to-apply waterproof treatment contains oils and waxes to soften and protect oiled and waxed leathers without compromising breathability. Push top click-clack tin packaging and contains Bitrex to prevent accidental ingestion.Method of application Remove loose surface dirt with our Rubber Sole Brush or our Suede Brush Test on a small area prior to full use Apply product to clean, dry shoes with a cloth Work into the leather to restore lost oils Do not buff 3 ounces
